2001June 10, 2001

🇺🇸 San Francisco, CA, USA

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, San Francisco, United States, June 10, 2001 -- June 15, 2001

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2001-06-san-francisco-usa

11 Resolutions

507Plenary
Pilot use of PDES, Inc. Ballot Software
SC 4 invites its member bodies to install and pilot the PDES, Inc. Ballot Software for the PDM Module Ballot. The results of the pilot use of this software will be considered in developing future e...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
506Plenary
Create ad hoc group on Industrial data on the web
SC 4 creates an ad hoc group to investigate how SC 4's standards can be used for communication of industrial data using the internet and the World Wide Web. The primary focus of the ad hoc group sh...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
505Plenary
Cancel PWI 0033 on SGML and industrial data
SC 4 cancels its project 10303-pwi 0033 "Preliminary work item: SGML and industrial data".
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
504Plenary
Appoint Jochen Haenisch as Deputy Convenor of WG 12
SC 4 thanks Christian Donges for his efforts as Deputy Convenor of WG 12 and approves Jochen Haenisch as Deputy Convenor of ISO/TC 184/SC 4/WG 12 "Common Resources".
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
503Plenary
Cooperate with Industry Alliance for Interoperability (IAI)
SC 4 welcomes the cooperation with the Industry Alliance for Interoperability on processing its existing specifications as ISO deliverables, and the efforts to ensure consistency between IAI and SC...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
502Plenary
Develop Test Case Guidelines for implementable standards
In accordance with Resolution 469, SC 4 requests all Project Leaders to (1) submit a summary of the industrial demand for test cases in their implementable standards and technical specifications pr...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
501Plenary
Cancel ISO 10303-217 Application Protocol Ship Piping
SC 4 cancels ISO 10303-217, Application Protocol: Ship Piping.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
500Plenary
Approve new project leaders and editors for SC 4 projects
SC 4 approves the following new project leaders or project editors for the associated SC 4 projects: |=== |Project |Project Leader |Editor |10303-0011ed3 |Jochen Haenisch | |10303-0024 |Dave Loffre...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"

Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its appreciation to US Pro and the staff of the Cathedral Hill Hotel for their efforts in organizing this meeting, arranging the facilities, excellent food, and social events. SC 4 a...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its appreciation to Mr. Jim Mandracchia, Chief Strategist, EXOSTAR, for his insightful presentation during the Monday luncheon meeting.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its appreciation to Mr. Ricardo Gonçalves for the video summary of the SC 4 Funchal meeting.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
